visual.background: Bright textured yellow background with star-like highlights.
visual.composition: Centered text stack with a speech-bubble question mark at upper left and a green CTA-like bar at the bottom.
visual.layout: Question prompt at top, large reward copy in center, green offer bar at bottom.
visual.typography: Large uppercase sans-serif text in white and yellow with drop shadows.

copy.headline: 2 SUALA CAVAB VERİB FREE BET 20 AZN QAZAN
copy.language_quality: Azerbaijani text mixed with English promotional wording; legible.

marketing.audience: Azerbaijani-speaking users considering a registration-related betting promotion, inferred from the path and copy.
marketing.hook: Answer two questions for a stated free-bet reward.
marketing.value_proposition: A 20 AZN free bet is presented after answering two questions.
claims_requiring_verification: Terms and restrictions are not visible

weaknesses: Very bright background may feel visually aggressive
English and Azerbaijani mix may need localisation review
test_ideas: Test a separate clear CTA with terms disclosure
change: Add verifiable conditions near the offer
Clarify whether the lower bar is actionable or descriptive
